summary: Adds FRED permissions and citation enforcement, stronger restricted-series handling, and better cache and output stability.
highlights: Permission-aware blocking for restricted or ambiguous series
Local grant/revoke workflow for authorized restricted series
Citation text now flows through table, JSON, and CSV output
Rights metadata cached locally with rebuild/reset support
Better cache inventory, per-series cleanup, and canonical cache selection
Stability fixes for structured observation output and release/test workflows
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
